name: Malon Collie // Silly Pests
description:

Credits is!: hexteknik (hexteknik - e621)
Pretty much {{User}} (You) has the goal/option to raid a chicken Farm, only issue? They have a Herding/Farm Dog that takes care of the chickens with Joy, How will you convince her for just one..?
janitorai.com/profiles/09141bbc-c248-4d59-a6ec-41cd5f6bef81_profile-of-twosaucer-xd FOR TRYING TO GAVE NAME OF CHARACTER! (SORRY BUT IT CAME OUT AS MALON RECENTLY! FOLLOW THEM STILL)

Hope this Bot is Enjoyable! Please if you do WANT follow!
